urgency_examples.quote: Kyunki mostly jo colleges hain yahan pe abhi applications jo hain wo close hone wali hain.

urgency_analysis.key_finding: Urgency tactics show minimal direct impact on application rate (12.8% vs 8.3%). Effect may depend on decision stage.
